title: antirrhinum majus f. angustifolium
intro: Antirrhinum majus f. angustifolium, also known as Dragon's Mouth or Snorky, is a plant species that belongs to the snapdragon family (Scrophulariaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Antirrhinum majus f. angustifolium include relief from muscle spasms, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a medicinal remedy.
